email_body:
Beste recruiter,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de stage Pure Player Marketing bij Levi Strauss & Co. in Brussel. Als junior digital marketer met ervaring in SEO, contentbeheer en data-analyse, ben ik gemotiveerd om bij te dragen aan campagnes voor pure players zoals Amazon, About You en ASOS.

In mijn huidige rol bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data en GEO-technieken toegepast om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Deze ervaring heeft mij geleerd om gestructureerd te werken, data te analyseren en samen te werken met externe partners.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel om drie dagen per week op kantoor in Brussel te werken.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn analytische en organisatorische vaardigheden in te zetten voor het Pure Player Marketing Team. Bedankt voor uw overweging.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear recruiter,

I am very excited to apply for the Pure Player Marketing Internship at Levi Strauss & Co. in Brussels. As a junior digital marketer with experience in SEO, content management, and data analysis, I am motivated to contribute to campaigns for pure players such as Amazon, About You, and ASOS.

In my current role at Episto, I perform on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I applied structured data and GEO techniques to improve visibility in AI-powered search engines. This experience has taught me to work in a structured way, analyze data, and collaborate with external partners.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible to work three days per week in the Brussels office.

I look forward to applying my analytical and organizational skills to the Pure Player Marketing Team. Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste lezer,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de stage Pure Player Marketing bij Levi Strauss & Co. in Brussel. Uw oproep voor een creatieve, georganiseerde en klantgerichte stagiair sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel als junior digital marketer met een technische basis in webdesign, SEO en GEO.

In mijn huidige functie bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogcontent en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites. Ik werk met tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Google Search Console om prestaties te monitoren en datagestuurde beslissingen te nemen. Deze ervaring heeft mij geleerd om gestructureerd te werken, deadlines te halen en samen te werken met externe partners.

Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema), entity-optimalisatie en GEO-technieken toegepast om de zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines te verbeteren. Dit toont mijn vermogen om innovatief te denken en trends te volgen, wat aansluit bij de focus op innovatie en best-in-class execution van Levi's.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel om drie dagen per week op kantoor in Brussel te werken. Ik ben leergierig, zelfgemotiveerd en gedreven om in een snelle omgeving te excelleren.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn vaardigheden in te zetten voor campagnes bij pure players zoals Amazon, About You en ASOS, en om te leren van het ervaren team bij Levi Strauss & Co. Bedankt voor uw tijd en overweging.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear reader,

I am very excited to apply for the Pure Player Marketing Internship at Levi Strauss & Co. in Brussels. Your call for a creative, organized, and customer-centric intern aligns perfectly with my profile as a junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO.

In my current role at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blog content, and building and maintaining WordPress sites. I work with tools such as SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Google Search Console to monitor performance and make data-driven decisions. This experience has taught me to work in a structured way, meet deadlines, and collaborate with external partners.

Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I applied structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and GEO techniques to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. This demonstrates my ability to think innovatively and follow trends, which aligns with Levi's focus on innovation and best-in-class execution.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible to work three days per week in the Brussels office. I am eager to learn, self-motivated, and driven to excel in a fast-paced environment.

I look forward to applying my skills to campaigns for pure players such as Amazon, About You, and ASOS, and to learn from the experienced team at Levi Strauss & Co. Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- On-page SEO, keyword research, and content writing for client websites (Episto)

tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
